questions.question: Identify the main source of water pollution and its impact on human health. Explain the preventive measures taken by the government to control water pollution.
What are the effects of noise pollution on human health? Describe the sources of noise pollution and the preventive measures that can be taken to minimize its impact.

State the causes and effects of air pollution. Explain the role of transportation and industrial activities in contributing to air pollution and describe the preventive measures that can be taken to reduce air pollution.
